title: Lead SEO Specialist at BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd

jsonLd.title: Lead SEO Specialist at BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd! We are hiring a SEO Specialist for our Delhi team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd:
BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage email marketing campaigns and push notifications

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Performance Marketing
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Referral bonus program
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Life and accident insurance
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with BlueStone Consulting Pvt Ltd!
